overview.aboutTheAppSection: Application Routio was developed as part of the bachelor's thesis at the Faculty of Information Technology, Brno University of Technology, under the supervision of Ing. Jiří Hynek, Ph.D. The application supports both unimodal routing, where only one transport mode is used, and multimodal routing, combining multiple modes within a single journey.
overview.whyAppSection1: Every day mobility is an essential part of people's lives. People travel by car, public transport, walking, or by alternative options such as shared bicycles.
overview.whyAppSection2: As cities continue to grow and mobility demands increase, there is a rising need to combine different modes of transport. Existing solutions often do not provide sufficient support for integrating cycling and shared cycling into multimodal route planning.
overview.whyAppSection3: The purpose of this work was therefore to create a unified solution that enables the combination of multiple transport modes within a single journey.
overview.externalSectionDB: Open public transport data of the South Moravian Region in GTFS and GTFS-RT formats
overview.externalSectionOTP: A routing engine for planning journeys using public transport, walking, and cycling
overview.externalSectionLissy: API providing route shapes and historical delay information for public transport services
overview.externalSectionNextbike: Real-time information about shared bicycles available at Nextbike stations
overview.externalSectionOSM: Open map data and information about transport infrastructure
overview.contactSection: If you have any questions, comments or suggestions regarding the application, please feel free to contact me by email:

steps.planningSection: Fill in the input form by selecting the date and choosing the route points
steps.preferencesSection: Set your route preferences, such as preferred transport modes or restrictions.
steps.resultsSection: Available connections will be displayed, including duration, transfers, and individual route segments.
steps.detailSection: The route detail provides detailed information about individual segments and stops.

step1.title: Input Form
step1.desc: Enter the starting and destination points, optionally add intermediate points, set the date and time, and adjust route planning preferences.

routePointsList.search: by searching for a location name,
routePointsList.map: by selecting directly from the map,

step1Bike.title: Shared Bike Stations
step1Bike.desc: Stations can be displayed after selecting shared bike and enabling their visibility.
step1Bike.add: Adding a station to the route:

list.click: by clicking on a station on the map,
list.position: by choosing its position within the route,
list.insert: a new point is inserted before the end of the route.

transportList.delays: option to display historical delays of connections over the last 7 days (at the cost of longer planning time).

bikeList.lock: setting the time required to lock the bike (for shared bikes counted twice, for unlocking and locking).

overviewList.map: displaying routes on the map and in a list,
overviewList.time: each route includes departure and arrival times,
overviewList.details: showing total duration, distance, and number of transfers.

visualList.colors: color-coded segments based on transport mode.

detailList.click: selecting a route displays detailed information.

infoList.length: total length and duration of the route segment.

departuresList.next: overview of upcoming departures for the same line,
departuresList.select: option to choose an earlier or later connection,
departuresList.stops: display of stops including indication of the vehicle’s current position.

delaysList.history: historical delays over the last 7 days (if enabled in preferences),
delaysList.position: display of the vehicle’s current position on the map.

bikeList.lock: display of time required to unlock and lock the bike,
bikeList.length: total length and duration of the route segment,
bikeList.elevation: elevation gain and route elevation profile.

sharedBikeList.current: clicking on a station shows the current number of available bikes,
sharedBikeList.expected: display of the expected number of bikes at arrival time (up to 24 hours ahead).

walkList.length: total length and duration of the route segment,
walkList.elevation: elevation gain and route elevation profile.

stations.title: Route Calculation
stations.desc: During multimodal planning, the application selects the most suitable shared bike station. The selection is based on evaluating multiple factors that influence the probability of successfully picking up or returning a bike as well as overall comfort. The following factors are considered:

availability.title: Prediction of shared bike availability.
availability.desc: The predicted number of available bikes at the expected arrival time at the station

angle.title: Angle relative to the planned route.
angle.desc: The angle between the direction of the planned route and the direction to the station, representing the deviation from the original route.

distance.title: Distance from the route point
distance.desc: The distance of the station from the route point.

stations.evaluation: Each of these factors is assigned a weight. Based on their combination, the application calculates a score for individual stations and selects the one that is most suitable for the given route.
stations.predictionDesc: The application uses a deep learning model to predict the availability of shared bikes at stations up to 24 hours in advance. This allows the application to select a station with a higher probability of having a bike available at the time of arrival.
stations.changeTitle: Changing shared bike station and personal bike stand
stations.changeDesc: Since the application selects one best-rated station/bike, the user has the option to change this station/stand. After the change, the application recalculates the affected part of the route and updates the route.

resultsInfo.routingError: An error occurred while calculating the route
resultsInfo.warningFoot: Walking distance exceeds the maximum allowed limit
resultsInfo.warningBicycle: Cycling distance exceeds the maximum allowed limit

publicTransport.nonContinuousDepartures: No more departures available. Please reroute with a later time.

inputForm.mapSelect: Pick a location from the map
inputForm.blockedPreferences: Bike segment is fixed due to station usage constraint

publicTransport.historicalDelays: Show historical delays of the connection
publicTransport.closeHistoricalDelays: Hide historical delays of the connection

bicycle.zeroWarning: A bike may not be available at the station

warnings.valueClamp: Value adjusted to fit the allowed range
warnings.nominatim: Nominatim is not responding. Using coordinates instead.
warnings.photon: Photon is not responding. Please select a location on the map.

errors.serverOffline: The server is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.routingFailed: An error occurred while calculating the route. Please try again.
